Why Intel (INTC) Stock Is Nosediving Shares of computer processor maker Intel (NASDAQ:INTC) fell 5.1% in the morning session after reports emerged that the company was considering a significant shift away from its 18A chip-making process. The potential move away from marketing its 18A process to new foundry customers signaled a major pivot for the chipmaker. This technology, which has incurred billions in development costs, was intended to make Intel competitive with industry leader TSMC.

North America Drone Market Forecast and Competitive Landscape Report 2025-2033 Featuring AeroVironment, Drone Delivery Canada, UVify, Intel, Alphabet, Boeing, Teledyne FLIR, 3D Robotics The North America Drone Market is projected to surge from US$ 11.20 billion in 2024 to US$ 26.90 billion by 2033, achieving a 10.22% CAGR from 2025. This growth is attributed to expanding commercial applications, defense investments, and favorable regulations. Sectors like agriculture, logistics, and public safety are leading drone adoption, with technologies enhancing connectivity through AI and IoT. The U.S. dominates due to its tech infrastructure, while Canada and Mexico show robust growth.
